description_long: This is a modern sport motorcycle with a streamlined, aerodynamic body featuring a striking red, white, and black color scheme. The fairings are emblazoned with the 'DUCATI' logo, and the design includes aggressive lines, a low-profile seat, and a prominent fuel tank. The front end is equipped with dual disc brakes, a large headlight assembly, and rearview mirrors mounted on the fairing. The wheels are alloy with visible disc brakes, and the exhaust system is partially visible beneath the bodywork. The motorcycle is designed for high performance, with clip-on handlebars and a compact, race-inspired stance.
description: A red, white, and black Ducati sport motorcycle with aerodynamic fairings, alloy wheels, and a race-inspired design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the motorcycle, highlighting the fairings, seat, and rear wheel.
description_view_1: Front three-quarter view emphasizing the headlight, front wheel, and handlebar area.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with clear visibility of the 'DUCATI' logo and the exhaust system.
description_view_3: Rear three-quarter view focusing on the rear wheel, seat, and tail section.
